name: Baklawa
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix nuts, sugar, spices, and 2 tbsp of butter.
2. Grease a 12-inch x 17-inch baking sheet with butter. Place two layers of Filo dough on the sheet and brush lightly with butter. Continue this process until about half a pound of the dough has been layered.
3. Spread the nut mixture evenly over the dough.
4. Lay the remaining Filo dough following the same procedure.
5. Cut into diamond shapes using a sharp knife, and pour the rest of the melted butter on top.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1½ - 2 hours.
7. Cool for ten minutes, and drizzle the syrup over the surface.
8. Let cool completely before serving.
